<pad><pad><pad><pad><pad><pad><pad> System: A chat between a human and an artificial intelligence assistant.The assistant gives helpful and polite answers to the human's questions.
User: You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is: Put the sandwich in the freezer, the plate on the shelf and the mop on the table.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a wardrobe, a pillow and a bed. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is in the wardrobe. There is a passage to a hallway here.
